## Description
What feature would you like?

## Use Case
Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work? (optional)

## Component
- [ ] Core (models, indexer)
- [ ] Client (WPF, 3D, UI)
- [ ] Server (hub, dashboard)
- [ ] Network (P2P, sharing)
- [ ] Claude AI integration
